testsuite.name: Gestión de Reservas en el Inventario

testcase.name: Flujo completo de creación y consulta de reserva de asiento

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <201> but was <409>.

testcase.failure: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <201> but was <409>.
